name: Archera
description: Archera — Cloud cost platform offering short-term Reserved Instance guarantees with automated commitment management.

seo.title: Archera — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Archera: Archera — Cloud cost platform offering short-term Reserved Instance guarantees with automated commitment management.

when_to_use: Short-term Reserved Instance commitments to reduce AWS bills
Automated commitment management without upfront RI purchases
Guaranteed savings on AWS compute with short lock-in periods
FinOps automation for teams unwilling to commit to 1-year RIs
Managed RI portfolio with financial guarantees on savings

pros: Short-term RI guarantees reduce commitment risk
cons: Insurance model adds complexity to billing
Savings share pricing eats into benefit
Overlaps with native AWS Savings Plans features
Enterprise contracts often needed for best terms
review.verdict: Insurance-backed commitment management useful when usage is volatile, overkill for stable predictable workloads.
review.best_for: Teams with fluctuating cloud spend wanting insured short-term commitments
review.not_for: Steady-state workloads where native 1/3-year RIs already work fine
